--- title: Activity Diagram - SDK Evaluation Workflow config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (FinTech_TransactionQueue) for server SDK evaluation. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define evaluation criteria
(FinTech_TransactionQueue)" as Define state "Shortlist candidate SDKs/libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate required features
(FinTech_AuthVault)" as Features state "Run local benchmarks
(FinTech_PaymentGateway)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC integration" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and integration plan" as Document [FinTech_AuthVault] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Features: supports Flutter
target platforms Shortlist --> Reject: lacks platform support Features --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC constraints Bench --> Shortlist: does not meet constraints Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给SDK选型流程画一个活动图。起点是FinTech的AuthVault模块，先定义评估标准，然后进入候选SDK的筛选阶段。
明白。从Define到Shortlist之后，评估流程怎么分叉？是不是要判断SDK是否支持Flutter这些目标平台？
对，Shortlist出来两条路：如果缺少平台支持就直接Reject，支持的话进入Features阶段评估功能需求，这个节点要关联FinTech_AuthVault的认证能力。
好的，Features后面接Bench，我标注上FinTech_PaymentGateway，表示在支付网关环境下跑本地基准测试。
Bench之后也要分叉：满足PoC约束的进入Select阶段，不满足的要回到Shortlist重新考虑其他候选。
Reject之后能回到Shortlist吗？还是直接结束？
Reject可以回到Shortlist，这样流程能循环。Select之后进入Document阶段，最后输出到FinTech_LedgerService归档决策记录。
完成了。整个流程从AuthVault开始，经过Define、Shortlist、Features、Bench，最终通过Document输出到LedgerService，循环和分支都处理好了。
